context.app_type: Task and reminder management mobile application
context.target: Minimal app logo / icon design for iOS and Android

visual_requirements.complexity: Simple, recognizable at small sizes (16x16 to 1024x1024)
visual_requirements.form: Single mark or symbol, no text, works in square format

symbol_suggestions: Checkmark within a circle or square
Abstract combination of list lines + check
Bell or clock merged with checkmark
avoid: Thin lines that disappear at small sizes

color_palette.description: Bright mint green - main brand color, conveys completion and freshness
color_palette.usage: Logo works in: solid accent, white on dark, dark on light, monochrome

technical_specs.style_notes: Flat design, sharp or slightly rounded corners

prompt_text: Minimal flat app icon logo for a todo and reminder application. A single geometric symbol combining a checkmark with a list or calendar. Bright mint green (#4ADE80). Clean lines, modern. No text. Recognizable at small sizes. Flat design, no gradients. Square format.

chatgpt_prompts.primary: Create a minimal, flat app icon logo for a todo and reminder mobile app. Design a single geometric symbol suggesting: checklist, task completion, reminders. Use bright mint green (#4ADE80). Simple enough to recognize at 32x32px. No text. Clean lines. Square format. Checkmark integrated with list lines or calendar block. Flat design, no gradients.
alternative_concepts: Minimal app icon: stylized checkmark inside a rounded square, mint green #4ADE80, flat design, no gradients, for todo app
Simple logo: three horizontal list lines, top line becomes a checkmark, mint green, minimalist flat square icon
Abstract icon: circle with checkmark, circle hints at notification bell, mint green #4ADE80, minimal flat for task app
